name: PaperReader Business Invariant Checks
description: 业务不变量校验配置 - 确保代码正确且功能正确

critical: INV-003: schema_version must be valid semver
INV-004: blocks must have unique block_id
INV-005: outline node_id must be unique
INV-EVIDENCE-003: at least one of segment_id, block_id, or node_id must be specified
warning: INV-006: canonical_text should match blocks content
INV-007: assets should reference valid blocks

critical: INV-ART-002: schema_version must be valid semver
INV-RUN-003: at least one of collection_id or document_ids must be specified
warning: INV-GRAPHSTATE-003: active_nodes and completed_nodes should not overlap

critical: Import source must be validated before submission
MinerU task state transitions must follow valid paths
NormalizedDocument must be produced from valid MinerURawResult
All errors must be structured with error_code, message, stage, retryable

pre_commit: Check all public functions have invariant validation where applicable
Verify error handling covers all error variants
Ensure no unwrap() or expect() in production code without justification
Validate that domain objects are constructed in valid state
post_implementation: Run cargo test to verify unit tests pass
Run cargo clippy to catch common issues
Verify all invariant tests are comprehensive
Check for proper documentation of business logic
